articles.title: NEAR AI and Coinbase join forces to make AI free and accessible for billions
articles.description: NEAR AI and Coinbase Onramp & Agent Kit launched the Open Agent Alliance (OAA), an initiative combining infrastructure to provide free AI services to over 5.5 billion web users globally.https://twitter.com/near_ai/status/1895289376755851676The alliance aims to deliver secure, open-source AI access by integrating payment systems, hosting infrastructure, and AI technology while prioritizing user privacy and economic inclusivity."As the global web continues to shift toward mobile users, we b...

articles.title: Solana Price Rebounds as CME Group Debuts Futures to Meet 'Increasing Client Demand'
articles.description: Solana was trading higher even as most digital assets sank further into negative territory on Friday.

articles.title: Chicago Mercantile Exchange Group to launch Solana futures on March 17
articles.description: The announcement came amid a downturn in the crypto markets and caused a spike in SOL’s price as markets struggle to recover lost ground.

articles.title: Ethereum nears 2-year low weekly close — Why $2K ETH price must hold
articles.description: Ethereum faces another 30% drop to $1,500 if the ETH price double-top pattern plays out, making the $2,000 level increasingly important for the bulls to hold.

articles.title: Texas Governor’s Office Issues Statement on Bitcoin Reserve Bill After Committee Approval
articles.description: Texas Governor Greg Abbott is looking forward to reviewing a bill that would allow the state to create a strategic Bitcoin reserve. In a statement to Crypto Intelligence News, Andrew Mahaleris, press secretary for Governor Abbott, said: “Already the home of crypto mining, this session Texas should become the crypto capital. “Governor Abbott looks forward to reviewing any proposal to create a...

articles.title: Bitcoin Legislation Advances: Arizona Moves Closer to Crypto Reserves
articles.description:
Arizona is advancing two key Bitcoin reserve bills, SB 1373 and SB 1025, positioning itself as a leader in state-level cryptocurrency adoption.

The post Bitcoin Legislation Advances: Arizona Moves Closer to Crypto Reserves first appeared on Ecoinimist.

articles.title: Texas Bitcoin Reserve Bill Advances, Faces Senate Vote
articles.description: Texas' Bitcoin Reserve bill passed the Business and Commerce Committee 9-0 and will now move to the Senate, though similar bills have struggled in other states.
